arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala says he has seen a player at Arsenal who's even better than Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister
Arsenal and Chelsea renew Interest in Dusan Vlahovic
arts.sum: As the January transfer window approaches, Premier League rivals Arsenal and Chelsea have reignited their interest in Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. The post Arsenal and Chelsea renew Interest in Dusan Vlahovic appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup clash between Arsenal and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Make it a Red & Blue Christmas: Great late gifts for Palace fans!
arts.sum: Christmas is just around the corner – and it's your last chance to order some of these fantastic gifts from the Crystal Palace Club Shop, all ideal for the festive season!

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling makes decision on Arsenal future as Mikel Arteta faces January transfer call
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling wants to fight for his place at Arsenal despite a tough time securing regular match action since his loan arrival from Chelsea. Despite his experience Sterling has not made the impact expected, netting a solitary goal across two Carabao Cup games.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling decision made as £180k-a-week star drops out: Arsenal predicted XI v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Arsenal are preparing to take on Crystal Palace in their Carabao Cup quarter-final clash on Wednesday night. The Gunners’ impressive form after the November international...

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed SHOCK boost in Mohammed Kudus chase
arts.sum: Arsenal have been handed a surprise boost in their pursuit of West Ham United superstar Mohammed Kudus . In addition, Arsenal are also chasing the aforementioned Kudus, who has impressed since leaving Ajax to join West Ham last year.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Mikel Arteta issues Declan Rice, Riccardo Calafiori, Oleksandr Zinchenko update ahead of EFL Cup tie
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta delivers a fresh update on the fitness of Declan Rice ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup quarter-final tie at home against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Arteta believes winning Carabao Cup can offer trophy springboard for Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal host Crystal Palace in quarter-final tie Arteta hopes to use competition to build momentum Mikel Arteta believes that lifting the Carabao Cup can be the springboard to Arsenal winning bigger trophies as they prepare to face Crystal Palace in the quarter-finals on Wednesday. Arteta celebrates his fifth anniversary in charge on Friday but has only the FA Cup win in his first season and two Community Shields to show for it after finishing as Premier League runners-up for the past two seasons. The Arsenal manager is likely to field a strong side against Palace despite a shortage of defensive options, with the teenager Myles Lewis-Skelly expected to start again at left-back in the absence of Riccardo Calafiori and Oleksandr Zinchenko. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have a 'gifted' youngster in their ranks who could become a 'tremendous' striker
